title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.530 - Costs adjudged as in other actions
text:
521.530.  Costs adjudged as in other actions. — In all cases of interpleader, costs may be adjudged for or against either party, as in ordinary actions.
(RSMo 1939 § 1490) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1326; 1919 § 1777; 1909 § 2346
